result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  serve       Start mock API server from OpenAPI definition
  validate    Validate OpenAPI definition file

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  serve       Start mock API server from OpenAPI definition
  validate    Validate OpenAPI definition file

result.stdout:
Usage: serve [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Start mock API server from OpenAPI definition

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Path to OpenAPI definition file (yaml/json)

Options:
  -p, --port <int>           Port number to listen on [Default: 5000]
  --host <string>            Host address to bind to [Default: @"localhost"]
  --cors <bool>              Enable CORS [Default: true]
  -v, --verbose              Enable verbose request/response logging
  --delay <int?>             Add fixed delay in milliseconds to all responses [Default: null]
  --delay-min <int?>         Minimum delay in milliseconds (used with delay-max for random delay) [Default: null]
  --delay-max <int?>         Maximum delay in milliseconds (used with delay-min for random delay) [Default: null]
  --error-rate <double>      Probability of returning an error (0.0-1.0) [Default: 0]
  --error-codes <string?>    Comma-separated list of error codes to return randomly [Default: null]

commands.payload:
Usage: serve [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Start mock API server from OpenAPI definition

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Path to OpenAPI definition file (yaml/json)

Options:
  -p, --port <int>           Port number to listen on [Default: 5000]
  --host <string>            Host address to bind to [Default: @"localhost"]
  --cors <bool>              Enable CORS [Default: true]
  -v, --verbose              Enable verbose request/response logging
  --delay <int?>             Add fixed delay in milliseconds to all responses [Default: null]
  --delay-min <int?>         Minimum delay in milliseconds (used with delay-max for random delay) [Default: null]
  --delay-max <int?>         Maximum delay in milliseconds (used with delay-min for random delay) [Default: null]
  --error-rate <double>      Probability of returning an error (0.0-1.0) [Default: 0]
  --error-codes <string?>    Comma-separated list of error codes to return randomly [Default: null]
